title: Freeze the evidence-risk rescue scope
description: Create a dated confirmation memo that replaces the uniform-improvement story with the evidence-risk audit, removes DiffuRec from confirmatory comparison, preserves all DiffuRec artifacts, and freezes the required baseline block and deadlines.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the memo is generated THEN it names SASRec, Caser, GRURec, and DiffRec as the required external confirmation block and labels BERT4Rec optional; WHEN DiffuRec is excluded THEN its frozen files and hashes remain present and the memo states that exclusion is due to model-family mismatch rather than outcome; WHEN scope is frozen THEN no experiment outside this CSV is authorized; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:1
review_initial_requirements: Check the memo distinguishes DiffRec from DiffuRec and does not delete, rename, or overwrite any frozen artifact.
review_regression_requirements: Verify every later paper-facing baseline table follows the frozen block, published-reference numbers are separated from local reruns, and the 2026-07-14, 2026-07-18, 2026-07-20, 2026-07-27, and 2026-07-30 cutoffs remain explicit.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R0; deadline:2026-07-11; diffurec_confirmatory:false; preserve_diffurec_artifacts:true; risk:high scope drift would invalidate confirmation

title: Lock the shared evaluator and validation selector
description: Turn the E0 full-tail repair into one versioned train-validation-test contract reusable by host, ours, and every external baseline, including deterministic evaluation RNG where required.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN a model adapter loads paper_raw_v1 THEN it consumes the frozen train, val, and test frames without native resplitting and ranks every real catalog item while excluding only documented padding or pseudo-item slots; WHEN validation runs THEN checkpoint selection uses validation NDCG@10 only with row-weighted tail-complete aggregation; WHEN test runs THEN the same candidate and aggregation contract is used and evaluated row count equals protocol row count; HARD STOP: any method-specific candidate or tail rule prevents quantitative comparison; ref: docs/reports/data/2026-07-10-evaluator-amendment/e0_evaluator_amendment.json:217
review_initial_requirements: Check item-ID adaptation, padding semantics, stochastic evaluation seeding, row weighting, tail coverage, and validation-only selection before any launcher can pass its protocol audit.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all locally rerun methods record evaluator version, selector metric, eval seed, expected and evaluated rows, split hashes, and candidate policy; verify no legacy-selected DiffuRec checkpoint is used to claim selector equivalence.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R0; blocks:RISK-06,RISK-07,RISK-10,RISK-11,RISK-12,RISK-13,RISK-14; training_runs:0; gpu_hours:1-3

title: Amend optimizer ownership and rerun the E1 lockstep trace
description: Choose one canonical ownership model for the core proposal parameter and make host, global_p, closed-gate full, and nonzero-gate full production paths use consistent trainable and optimizer semantics.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN copied initialization and ordered batches are used THEN steps 0, 1, 100, and 1000 match for parameter identity, trainable flags, optimizer membership and group state, RNG, proposal rows, loss terms, gradients, updates, and fixed-seed sampling within FP32 max-abs tolerance 1e-6 for every g-zero path; WHEN any tracked field differs THEN no E1 pass marker is written, end-to-end equivalence and unqualified safety wording are removed, and the expensive three-seed matrix remains blocked; ref: docs/reports/data/2026-07-10-e01-gzero-production-trace/e01_gzero_hard_stop_zh.md:5
review_initial_requirements: Determine the intended scientific ownership before changing code; check the amendment fixes a semantic inconsistency rather than tuning toward observed metrics and preserves the canonical initial parameter hash contract.
review_regression_requirements: Verify the new trace compares real production paths, not re-derived mock formulas; verify the first prior divergence core_proposal_logits.in_optimizer is explicitly closed or retained as a hard stop; verify old E1 evidence remains archived.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R1; deadline:2026-07-11T23:59:00+08:00; seed:100; trace_steps:0,1,100,1000; fp32_tolerance:1e-6; blocks:RISK-06,RISK-07,RISK-13,RISK-14; no_rescue_tuning:true

title: Implement train-only positive-exposure risk reports
description: Build a deterministic report for U_ds, exact positive exposure EPE, PNE@10, excess PNE@10, entropy, concentration, and user-level slices from frozen training transitions only.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the report runs THEN EPE is mean log(q_text(y|h)+1e-12)-log(q_core(y)+1e-12) and PNE@10 includes y plus nine frozen-embedding nearest real items while excluding padding and pseudo-items; WHEN 4000 train transitions are sampled with seed 7 THEN repeated runs reproduce point estimates and hashes; WHEN uncertainty is requested THEN user-clustered resampling is used or marked not-estimable if user IDs are absent; HARD STOP: any validation/test row or target in the risk input invalidates the artifact; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:75
review_initial_requirements: Check formulas, epsilon, top-10 neighborhood construction, core/text proposal normalization, train-only split provenance, seed, row identities, and item-space exclusions on toy and production contracts.
review_regression_requirements: Verify every report records source paths and SHA-256, candidate policy, sample size, seed, formulas, point estimates, clustered intervals or the exact not-estimable reason; verify existing U_ds values are reproduced before new metrics are interpreted.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; discovery_metric:true; confirmatory_metric:not-yet-frozen; train_rows:4000; sampling_seed:7; cpu_only:true; blocks:RISK-04,RISK-05

title: Build and preflight the controlled evidence banks
description: Create Beauty and Steam popularity-stratified item-embedding permutation banks at 0, 20, 40, 60, 80, and 100 percent corruption with seed 100 and run the train-only risk report on all twelve banks before training.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN each bank is built THEN exactly the declared fraction of eligible real-item rows is permuted within frozen popularity strata while item IDs, tensor shape, row norms, padding and pseudo-item semantics remain valid; WHEN all twelve preflights complete THEN source, bank, permutation, stratum, train split, seed, and code hashes are archived; WHEN neither EPE nor another preregistered primary risk statistic spans a 20 percent relative clean range or 0.5 pooled standard deviations in either dataset THEN no pilot launches and RISK-05 records a stop; ref: scripts/build_corrupted_text_bank.py:44
review_initial_requirements: Check popularity strata use training information only, no validation/test target influences permutation, fraction counts are exact, collisions and fixed points are reported, and clean banks are not modified.
review_regression_requirements: Verify twelve unique immutable bank hashes, six levels per dataset, corruption seed 100, unchanged item mapping and split hashes, risk-report schema consistency, and zero training launch before preflight publication.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R2-preflight; datasets:Beauty,Steam; corruption_levels:0,20,40,60,80,100; corruption_seed:100; training_runs:0; gpu_hours:0-2; blocks:RISK-05

title: Freeze the prospective risk protocol and pilot predictions
description: Issue a dated preregistration binding one primary risk statistic, the monotone phi_R mapping, 0/60/100 pilot predictions, association direction, run matrix, and pass/fail thresholds before any corresponding validation or test result is read.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-04 passes range coverage THEN the preregistration records exact formulas, thresholds, phi_R, bank hashes, model config, selector, evaluator, seeds, arm count, predicted ordering, Spearman rho threshold -0.5, 0.002 NDCG reversal tolerance, worst-delta improvement rule, and no-rescue branch; WHEN range coverage fails THEN it closes as no-go and RISK-06/RISK-07 do not launch; AFTER freeze no metric, threshold, corruption level, or prediction may change in this cycle; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:166
review_initial_requirements: Check the primary statistic choice uses only train preflight behavior and mechanism rationale, not validation/test performance, and that discovery inputs are labeled non-confirmatory.
review_regression_requirements: Verify the final report can replay the exact preregistered decision without discretionary interpretation; verify failures remove the predictive claim rather than trigger a finer grid, new metric, threshold, seed, or tuned corruption level.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R2; deadline:2026-07-12T23:59:00+08:00; prerequisite:RISK-03,RISK-04; blocks:RISK-06,RISK-07; test_blind_freeze:true

title: Run the Beauty 0/60/100 risk-response pilot
description: Run the frozen Beauty diagnostic pilot at 0, 60, and 100 percent evidence corruption, adding risk_gated_full only on the E1-pass branch.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-01 and RISK-05 pass and RISK-02 has a terminal outcome THEN run one shared seed-100 host plus text_anchor_only at all three levels; WHEN RISK-02 passes THEN also run risk_gated_full at all three levels for exactly seven Beauty runs, otherwise run the four diagnostic-only host/anchor runs and forbid a method claim; WHEN runs finish THEN report all metrics, risks, gates where applicable, exposure, manifests, bank hashes, selector, evaluator, and unfavorable outcomes; HARD STOP: any config/hash mismatch invalidates the condition and no replacement tuning is authorized; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:177
review_initial_requirements: Check conditional four-versus-seven run cardinality, seed 100, arm definitions, shared-host independence from bank, one process per GPU, isolation, RISK-02 terminal evidence, and prelaunch binding to the preregistration.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all 0/60/100 diagnostic conditions appear together, risk_gated_full appears only with E1 pass, no result is omitted, metric rows equal Beauty protocol counts, kernel_version and E1 outcome are recorded, and language remains single-run observation.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R3-input; prerequisite:RISK-01,RISK-02-terminal,RISK-05; dataset:Beauty; runs_if_e1_pass:7; runs_if_e1_fail:4; seed:100; gpu_hours:1-3; isolated_dirs:true; one_train_process_per_gpu:true

title: Run the Steam 0/60/100 risk-response pilot
description: Run the frozen Steam diagnostic pilot at 0, 60, and 100 percent evidence corruption, adding risk_gated_full only on the E1-pass branch.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-01 and RISK-05 pass and RISK-02 has a terminal outcome THEN run one shared seed-100 host plus text_anchor_only at all three levels; WHEN RISK-02 passes THEN also run risk_gated_full at all three levels for exactly seven Steam runs, otherwise run the four diagnostic-only host/anchor runs and forbid a method claim; WHEN runs finish THEN report all metrics, risks, gates where applicable, exposure, manifests, bank hashes, selector, evaluator, and unfavorable outcomes; HARD STOP: any config/hash mismatch invalidates the condition and no replacement tuning is authorized; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:177
review_initial_requirements: Check conditional four-versus-seven run cardinality, seed 100, arm definitions, shared-host independence from bank, one process per GPU, isolation, RISK-02 terminal evidence, and prelaunch binding to the preregistration.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all 0/60/100 diagnostic conditions appear together, risk_gated_full appears only with E1 pass, no result is omitted, metric rows equal Steam protocol counts, kernel_version and E1 outcome are recorded, and language remains single-run observation.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R3-input; prerequisite:RISK-01,RISK-02-terminal,RISK-05; dataset:Steam; runs_if_e1_pass:7; runs_if_e1_fail:4; seed:100; gpu_hours:8-24; isolated_dirs:true; one_train_process_per_gpu:true

title: Apply the controlled-response go or no-go gate
description: Evaluate the Beauty and Steam pilot exactly once against the frozen phenomenon, method, and provenance criteria, then select the method, audit-only, or stop exit.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN both pilot artifacts exist THEN compute every preregistered adjacent ordering, descriptive Spearman rho, host-relative delta, and protocol check without adding analyses; WHEN the phenomenon criteria and E1 pass and the risk-gated worst-delta criterion hold THEN authorize the risk-gated method exit; WHEN the phenomenon criteria hold but E1 fails THEN select bounded evidence-risk audit without risk-gated training or optimizer/end-to-end reduction claims; WHEN the phenomenon fails or protocol parity fails THEN stop the main-track rescue and forbid metric, threshold, grid, corruption, or seed rescue; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:188
review_initial_requirements: Check the decision implementation reads the dated preregistration and raw artifacts rather than paper prose or hand-entered favorable values, and treats the method criterion as not applicable on the E1-fail diagnostic branch.
review_regression_requirements: Verify one and only one exit is selected, every failed or not-applicable subcriterion is visible, negative outcomes remain archived, and authorization flags for RISK-10 through RISK-18 match the selected exit.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; gate:R3,R4; deadline:2026-07-13T23:59:00+08:00; decision_deadline:2026-07-14; prerequisite:RISK-06,RISK-07; no_rescue:true

title: Build the shared-protocol classic baseline adapter
description: Implement one audited adapter interface for SASRec, Caser, and GRURec that directly consumes paper_raw_v1 frames, preserves item mapping, uses the common selector/evaluator, and records a frozen author-default configuration.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN each model is selected THEN the adapter constructs training examples from existing frames without native preprocessing or resplitting and emits manifest, best/latest checkpoints, validation/test metrics, and row provenance; WHEN toy and production-contract tests run THEN ID adaptation, padding, candidates, selector, tail rows, and deterministic seed behavior pass for all three models; HARD STOP: a model that cannot satisfy protocol parity is excluded as a documented gap before any of its four-domain training launches; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:151
review_initial_requirements: Check one predeclared config per model, no test-based tuning, no native split, no sampled-candidate evaluation, and no writes to frozen host/full artifact roots.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all adapters share evaluator/selector code rather than reimplementing metrics, record software versions and exact CLI/config, and make all-four reporting mechanically enforceable.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-01; models:SASRec,Caser,GRURec; training_runs:0; blocks:RISK-10

title: Run SASRec Caser and GRURec on all four domains
description: Execute the frozen classic baseline configurations on Steam, ML1M, Beauty, and ATG with seed 100 and report each model as a complete four-domain block.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN any model launches THEN exactly four isolated domain runs for that model must complete or the entire model row is marked incomplete; WHEN the required block finishes THEN one dated table reports all twelve runs with HR@10, NDCG@10, selector, best step, manifests, split/evaluator hashes, runtime, memory, and unfavorable outcomes; HARD STOP: no sweep, second seed, favorable subset, copied published number, or method-specific evaluator is permitted; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:151
review_initial_requirements: Check RISK-09 protocol audit pass markers, two free L20 slots or a one-process-per-card queue, frozen configs, isolated roots, and the all-four launch obligation before the first run.
review_regression_requirements: Verify 3 models x 4 domains equals 12 reported outcomes, published and local numbers are not mixed, single-run wording is used, and no model row disappears because it underperforms.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-08-pass,RISK-09; models:SASRec,Caser,GRURec; datasets:Steam,ML1M,Beauty,ATG; seed:100; runs:12; gpu_hours:12-30; all_four_required:true

title: Integrate and run DiffRec on all four domains
description: Reproduce the preference-score diffusion baseline DiffRec, not DiffuRec, under the same regenerated splits, validation selector, and full-catalog evaluator with one predeclared configuration and seed 100.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the upstream method identity is audited THEN the manifest records the official repository, immutable revision, model family, configuration source, and confirms that no DiffuRec code or artifact is reused as DiffRec; WHEN training launches THEN Steam, ML1M, Beauty, and ATG all complete and one table reports every result; HARD STOP: protocol parity failure, infeasible full-catalog memory, or missing trustworthy implementation closes DiffRec as a documented gap without substituting DiffuRec or copied paper numbers; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:151
review_initial_requirements: Verify the cited paper/code is the preference-score DiffRec baseline from PreferGrow, inspect computational complexity and catalog memory before launch, and freeze one configuration without a validation/test grid.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all four domains are present together, method labels and citations are exact, no DiffuRec number enters the table, shared evaluator/selector metadata is complete, and failures are reported rather than replaced.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-01,RISK-08-pass; model:DiffRec; not_model:DiffuRec; datasets:Steam,ML1M,Beauty,ATG; seed:100; prospective_runs:4; gpu_hours:12-36; all_four_required:true

title: Optionally run BERT4Rec on all four domains
description: Add BERT4Rec as an explicitly optional extra classic baseline only after the required baseline block and only if the remaining budget can finish all four domains before paper freeze.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-10 and RISK-11 are complete and projected cumulative usage remains below 10 GPU-days THEN one frozen BERT4Rec configuration may launch on all four domains with seed 100; WHEN launched THEN all four results and manifests are reported; WHEN budget or time gate fails THEN close this row as deferred with zero launch and do not call BERT4Rec part of the original PreferGrow baseline block; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:162
review_initial_requirements: Check required baselines are complete, remaining GPU budget and wall-clock estimate are recorded, and no partial launch can occur.
review_regression_requirements: Verify optional/deferred wording is accurate, all-four reporting holds if launched, and the paper does not imply BERT4Rec was in PreferGrow Table 1.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; priority:P2; prerequisite:RISK-10,RISK-11; budget_gate:cumulative_gpu_days_lt_10; model:BERT4Rec; prospective_runs:4; seed:100; all_four_required:true

title: Run the four-domain three-seed matched host full matrix
description: After E1 and the response pilot pass, run host and frozen risk_gated_full for seeds 100, 101, and 102 on Steam, ML1M, Beauty, and ATG under matched initialization and the common protocol.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-02 and RISK-08 pass THEN exactly 24 isolated runs launch with matched seed-pair initialization policy, ordered-loader policy, split and bank hashes, selector, evaluator, and best/latest retention; WHEN all runs finish THEN report every per-seed HR@10 and NDCG@10, mean, standard deviation, paired delta, mean gate, EPE, U_ds, worst delta, average delta, runtime, and provenance; HARD STOP: incomplete seed pairs, config mismatch, or cumulative forecast above 12 GPU-days stops further launches and preserves completed outcomes without a superiority claim; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:202
review_initial_requirements: Check E1 pass marker, R3 authorization, exact 4 x 2 x 3 run matrix, pairwise initialization/batch contracts, isolated roots, one process per L20, and no writes to frozen artifacts.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all 24 outcomes or explicit incomplete statuses are present, seed reversals remain visible, statistics do not use significance or stability language from n=3 alone, and Table 2 historical numbers are not selectively replaced.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-01,RISK-02-pass,RISK-08-pass; datasets:Steam,ML1M,Beauty,ATG; arms:host,risk_gated_full; seeds:100,101,102; runs:24; gpu_days:5.4-6.9; one_train_process_per_gpu:true; hard_budget_gpu_days:12

title: Run the frozen high-risk and low-risk mechanism controls
description: Use train-only risk to select one highest-risk and one lowest-risk pilot condition, then compare host, text_anchor_only, global_p, dataset-gate-only, full, and u_shuffle without test-driven condition selection.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN RISK-08 passes THEN the dated selection record identifies conditions using the frozen train-only primary statistic; WHEN seed-100 controls finish THEN all six arms per selected condition are reported with risks, gates, exposure, metrics, hashes, and selector; WHEN the full versus u_shuffle pair is expanded THEN only seeds 101 and 102 are added under unchanged configs; HARD STOP: test-based condition choice, rescue controls, or missing arms invalidate the mechanism claim; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:217
review_initial_requirements: Check condition selection is replayable from train-only risk, control definitions change only the intended factor, shared host artifacts are not double-counted, and new runs fit the hard GPU budget.
review_regression_requirements: Verify aligned versus shuffled claims use matched configs and seeds, every launched arm is reported, first-generation v1 evidence remains labeled historical, and no single-run mechanism result is called significant or stable.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-08-pass; selection:train-only-highest-and-lowest-risk; seed100_arms:host,text_anchor_only,global_p,dataset_gate_only,full,u_shuffle; expansion:full,u_shuffle-seeds101,102; gpu_hours:4-12

title: Quantify seed metric and risk uncertainty
description: Build raw-seed summaries, user-clustered paired bootstrap intervals for host-full metric deltas, clustered intervals for train-only risk, and condition-aware association sensitivity without conflating uncertainty sources.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN host/full row-level outputs load THEN 1000 to 5000 user-clustered paired bootstrap replicates report 95 percent intervals for HR@10 and NDCG@10 deltas; WHEN train transition records include user IDs THEN the same clustered principle estimates EPE, PNE@10, and U_ds uncertainty, otherwise the field is explicitly not-estimable; WHEN response association is reported THEN every point, descriptive Spearman rho, and dataset/condition-aware bootstrap sensitivity appear; HARD STOP: no confirmatory p-value is inferred from 1/24 or three seeds; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:226
review_initial_requirements: Check cluster unit, paired sampling, reproducible bootstrap seed, raw row provenance, minimum replicate count, missing-user-ID behavior, and separation of seed dispersion from user uncertainty.
review_regression_requirements: Verify raw seeds remain visible, intervals reproduce point estimates, no pseudo-replication treats corruption levels as independent users, multiple analyses are labeled descriptive, and forbidden significance/equivalence wording is absent.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; phase:analysis; bootstrap_reps:1000-5000; user_clustered:true; cpu_only:true; prerequisite:RISK-08,RISK-13

title: Profile host and risk-gated efficiency on isolated L20s
description: Measure parameters, checkpoint size, peak memory, train and evaluation throughput, and sampling latency for frozen host/full checkpoints on Steam and ML1M under one process per L20.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN an L20 is isolated THEN host and full use identical precision, batch size, 100 warm-up batches, 1000 timed batches, and five repeats; WHEN profiling completes THEN report hardware, driver, CUDA, PyTorch, workload boundary, parameters, checkpoint size, peak memory, throughput, latency, median, and range; WHEN timing coefficient of variation exceeds 5 percent THEN repeat the complete protocol at most once and report both attempts; HARD STOP: no training or checkpoint reselection; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:241
review_initial_requirements: Check GPU isolation, synchronized CUDA timing, identical workload and precision, frozen checkpoint hashes, and no overlap with another GPU process.
review_regression_requirements: Verify absolute and relative overhead are both reported, all repeats remain visible, high dispersion is not hidden, software/hardware provenance is complete, and profiling does not mutate checkpoints.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-13; datasets:Steam,ML1M; checkpoints:host,full; warmup:100; timed_batches:1000; repeats:5; gpu_hours:2-6; training_runs:0

title: Build confirmatory tables figures and claim traceability
description: Generate the baseline, three-seed, mechanism, uncertainty, efficiency, risk-response, exposure-slice, and claim-evidence artifacts only from dated real CSV or JSON sources.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN result artifacts are complete THEN generate table_shared_protocol_baselines.csv, table_three_seed_host_full.csv, table_mechanism_controls.csv, risk_response_points.csv, table_efficiency.csv, publication figures in PDF SVG and PNG, and claim_evidence_traceability.md; WHEN any source is absent THEN use NA plus a reason and never mock or infer a result; WHEN figures render THEN every plotted point maps to dataset, corruption, arm, seed, bank hash, and manifest; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:278
review_initial_requirements: Check table schemas and figure data manifests before generation, reject stale/partial artifacts, and verify captions state measurements rather than hoped-for conclusions.
review_regression_requirements: Verify no DiffuRec number appears in confirmatory outputs, all required baseline domains and all response points are present, negative outcomes and raw seeds are visible, figure/table numbers reproduce their source files, and no planning data enters the package.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-08,RISK-10,RISK-11,RISK-13,RISK-14,RISK-15,RISK-16; mock_data_forbidden:true; diffurec_confirmatory:false

title: Rewrite the English and Chinese papers around evidence risk
description: Synchronize the manuscript story to the selected R4 exit, remove DiffuRec from confirmatory comparison, replace uniform-improvement and unqualified safety claims, and integrate the real baseline, controlled-response, mechanism, uncertainty, and limitation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN R4 selects risk-gated method THEN title, abstract, contributions, method, experiments, discussion, conclusion, and supplement describe controlled evidence risk, train-only diagnostics, risk gating, and kernel-level theory with no universal gain claim; WHEN R4 selects audit-only THEN method-performance and end-to-end reduction claims are removed; WHEN DiffuRec is removed from the main comparison THEN a supplementary protocol note preserves the model-mismatch rationale without deleting artifacts; WHEN both languages are updated THEN claim pairs and all numbers match; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:251
review_initial_requirements: Check the selected R4 exit and claim-evidence map before editing; preserve the reproducibility statement that model selection used validation only and test metrics were logged during development.
review_regression_requirements: Verify forbidden claims are absent, kernel-level and end-to-end statements are separated, U_ds is not called a universal predictor, every number has a dated artifact comment, English and Chinese meanings agree, no DiffuRec confirmatory row remains, and negative results are not hidden.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-08,RISK-17; abstract_freeze:2026-07-18; submission_checkpoint:2026-07-20; full_paper:2026-07-27; supplement:2026-07-30; bilingual_sync:true

title: Assemble the reproducibility and submission evidence package
description: Create a dated immutable package containing protocols, configs, commit IDs, hashes, manifests, evaluator and selector versions, baseline identity audits, risk preregistration, raw result tables, figures, limitations, and a stale-artifact exclusion index.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the package is assembled THEN every paper table and figure resolves to a packaged source with SHA-256 and every run resolves to code revision, CLI/config, seed, split/bank hash, selector, evaluator, checkpoint, and hardware metadata; WHEN old DiffuRec and partial artifacts are indexed THEN they remain preserved but cannot be selected by confirmatory builders; WHEN checksums verify on a clean read-only audit THEN the package may be cited by the supplement; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:278
review_initial_requirements: Check inclusion and exclusion manifests, stale markers, relative paths, SHA-256 generation, package size, anonymity, licensing, and absence of credentials or private paths that cannot be released.
review_regression_requirements: Verify a clean extraction reproduces table/figure source discovery without remote mutable dependencies, DiffuRec remains auditable but excluded from confirmation, all failed/stopped rows have evidence, and the package does not claim unavailable code or data are complete.
notes: source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; prerequisite:RISK-17,RISK-18; package:dated-immutable; sha256_required:true; anonymity_required:true

title: Review the approved evidence-risk vision against delivery
description: Use a same-model review to compare this approved design with every delivered issue, artifact, experiment gate, manuscript claim, validation result, and exclusion decision before closing the CSV.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN all non-review rows are closed as completed, stopped, deferred, or not-estimable with evidence THEN perform a same-model vision review; WHEN gaps, selective reporting, protocol mismatches, or overstated claims are found THEN append atomic follow-up issues and REVIEW-02; WHEN no gaps remain THEN close the CSV and record remaining submission risks; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md:310
review_initial_requirements: Verify every prior non-review row has a terminal evidence-backed status and the selected R4 exit is recorded before review.
review_regression_requirements: Check source-specific alignment: DiffuRec is absent from confirmation but preserved; DiffRec identity is correct; required baselines obey all-four reporting; E1 language matches the trace; risk definitions and predictions predate pilot outcomes; no rescue metric or threshold was added after failure; all response points and raw seeds are reported; theory is limited to kernel objects unless production equivalence passes; published and local numbers are separated; English and Chinese claims match; all paper numbers trace to dated artifacts.
notes: review_kind:vision; review_agent:same-model-sub-agent; source_doc:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-10-aaai27-evidence-risk-rescue-design.md; final_gate:true
